text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuu! With this, today's training menu is complete huh.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… As I thought it's a suitable inclined 
road. There's even an athletic park nearby…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yo Ikuno. What are you looking at?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Stego, good work today. The other day, 
I found a good training spot.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
A long, unpaved inclined road that's gentle 
on the legs. A hill riddled with stairs and 
bare dirt etc… The view is good too so it's 
perfect for training.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of going now so 
I was just confirming the route.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that kind of place…! It seems real 
interesting! Could I tag along?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Most certainly, I do not mind. A 
companion would make this trip 
most reassuring.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Though, this is only on the condition 
that you are not already overworked. 
May I ask about your condition?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: That's not the case at all right? Trainer?
choice_data_list: No worries, I'll see you later!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright! Then let's get going. I'm looking 
forward to this! If it's Ikuno's plan, then 
it'll be perfect.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Fufu, thank you very much. Now then, 
let's get this training on the way!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We cannot be having that then. You should 
make sure your health comes first.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I can't say no to that, guess I'm looking 
out for myself today. Be my guide next 
time will you.
